title: Dynasty Index
description: An immersive collector vault for selecting and inspecting six fictional premium sports trading cards.

prompt.objective: Build a vault for selecting and inspecting six fictional premium sports cards.

mintAssets.brief: Vault stands, slab details, memorabilia, and light blades.
Six fictional athlete portraits across six sports.
Vault ambience plus selection and foil effects.

experience: Select six cards and sync profile, stats, grade, light, and atmosphere.
Orbit, zoom, flip, inspect, open notes, reset, and support keyboard and touch.
prompt.visualDirection: Graphite museum architecture, frosted acrylic, warm light, and vermilion accents.

thumbnail.alt: Jalen Quill basketball card displayed in the Dynasty Index collector vault

social.title: Dynasty Index
social.description: Select, flip, and inspect six premium fictional sports cards in an atmospheric collector vault.

image.alt: Jalen Quill basketball card displayed in the Dynasty Index collector vault
